Here is a paragraph based on the green mango:

The Green mango, also known as Mangifera indica subsp. mangifera, is the unripe fruit of the mango tree, known for its green, hard skin and its high nutritional value. The Green mango has various health benefits, including aiding in digestion, reducing inflammation, and providing antioxidants. The bioactive constituents of the Green mango include vitamins A and C, potassium, magnesium, and various polyphenolic compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The most common herbal preparations made with the Green mango are teas, juices, and powders, which are used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
